summary: Iteration 258 — Multi-Tenant Step 1 Testing Complete. All 16 backend tests passed. Verified: 1) tenant_id field present in all MongoDB documents, 2) Auth /me endpoint returns user with tenant_id, 3) All CRUD operations include tenant_id filtering, 4) Default tenant exists in tenants collection, 5) All existing data backfilled with tenant_id='default', 6) Frontend loads correctly without blank page.
seed_data_creation: Used existing demo data with tenant_id='default'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant Step 1 implementation verified. Key findings: 1) Default tenant created in tenants collection with tenant_id='default'. 2) All users and sessions have tenant_id field. 3) All CRUD operations (clients, commesse, preventivi, invoices, etc.) filter by both user_id AND tenant_id. 4) Demo mode works via POST /api/demo/login which sets session cookie. 5) Auth /me endpoint returns tenant_id in user object. 6) All existing data backfilled with tenant_id='default'.
